title: Through the Bible Chronologically in a Year
description: This is a 365-day chronological Bible reading plan that arranges scripture in the order events occurred historically, not canonical book order. The goal is for the reader to experience the Bible as a single unfolding story.
long_description: Experience an intellectually compelling way to read the Bible! Seeing Job alongside the patriarchs, watching the Psalms land in the middle of Samuel and Kings, the prophets contextualized against the monarchy they were speaking into — it reframes the whole narrative.
